# XCTAttachment.Lifetime.keepAlways

**Case**

Indicates that the attachment should be persisted as part of the test’s results even if the test passes.

## Declaration

```swift
case keepAlways
```

## Attachment Lifetimes

- **XCTAttachment.Lifetime.deleteOnSuccess**: Indicates that the attachment should be deleted if the test passes.

items.description: Indicates that the attachment should be deleted if the test passes.
